name: RE:LEASE
subtitle: Ipamorelin
description: Ipamorelin — Selective GH secretagogue for clean growth hormone release and recovery research.
details: A 5-amino acid pentapeptide and selective GHRP that stimulates GH secretion with minimal off-target effects. Studied for precise GH pulse induction without significant cortisol, prolactin, or insulin elevation in research models.
benefits: Minimal Side Effect Profile in Research

name: RE:TATRUTIDE
subtitle: Retatrutide
description: Retatrutide — Triple GIP/GLP-1/Glucagon receptor agonist for advanced metabolic and weight regulation research.
details: Next-generation synthetic peptide activating GIP, GLP-1, and glucagon receptors simultaneously. Among the most potent research tools for metabolic regulation, appetite control, and energy expenditure. Available in high-dose 60mg lyophilised vial.

name: RE:GENERATE
subtitle: IGF-1 LR3
description: IGF-1 LR3 — Long-acting insulin-like growth factor for muscle growth and cellular regeneration research.
details: Recombinant analogue of Insulin-Like Growth Factor 1 with an extended half-life via an Arg3 substitution. Studied for anabolic signalling, muscle satellite cell activation, and cellular hyperplasia in research models.

name: RE:TAN
subtitle: Melanotan II
description: Melanotan II — Melanocyte-stimulating hormone analogue for UV-independent tanning and pigmentation research.
details: Synthetic analogue of alpha-melanocyte-stimulating hormone (α-MSH). Studied extensively for its role in melanogenesis, UV-independent skin pigmentation, and appetite modulation in research settings.

name: RE:LEAN
subtitle: HGH Fragment 176-191
description: HGH Frag 176-191 — Truncated GH fragment for selective lipolysis and fat metabolism research.
details: Stabilised analogue of the C-terminal fragment of human growth hormone. Studied for selective lipolytic activity without the growth-promoting effects of full-length GH — targeting abdominal and visceral fat in research models.
benefits: No Impact on Blood Glucose or IGF-1

name: RE:GLOW
subtitle: GHK-Cu
description: GHK-Cu — Copper peptide for skin regeneration, wound healing, and longevity research.
details: Glycyl-L-histidyl-L-lysine copper complex. A naturally occurring tripeptide-copper complex studied extensively for its role in collagen synthesis, wound healing, and cellular regeneration throughout the body.

name: RE:SHAPE
subtitle: Tesamorelin
description: Tesamorelin — GHRH analogue for body composition and growth hormone release research.
details: Synthetic analogue of growth hormone-releasing hormone (GHRH). Studied for its effects on growth hormone secretion, reduction of visceral adiposity, and metabolic health in research settings.
benefits: Reduction of Visceral and Abdominal Fat

name: RE:PULSE
subtitle: CJC-1295 with DAC
description: CJC-1295 with DAC — Long-acting GHRH analogue for sustained growth hormone release research.
details: Modified GHRH analogue with a Drug Affinity Complex (DAC) extension, dramatically extending plasma half-life. Studied for sustained pulsatile GH secretion, lean muscle development, and fat metabolism over extended dosing intervals.

name: RE:KINDLE
subtitle: Kisspeptin-10
description: Kisspeptin-10 — Neuropeptide for reproductive hormone axis and LH pulse research.
details: Kisspeptin-10 is a 10-amino acid fragment of the kisspeptin family, encoded by the KISS1 gene. A critical regulator of the hypothalamic-pituitary-gonadal (HPG) axis, studied for its role in LH/FSH release, testosterone production, and reproductive function.

name: RE:TALIATE
subtitle: MOTS-c
description: MOTS-c — Mitochondrial-derived peptide for cellular energy, metabolism, and endurance research.
details: 16-amino acid peptide encoded within the mitochondrial genome. Regulates metabolic homeostasis, cellular energy sensing, and mitochondrial function. Studied for its role in exercise capacity, glucose regulation, and longevity signalling.

name: RE:SCULPT
subtitle: AOD9604
description: AOD9604 — Modified HGH fragment for targeted lipolysis and body composition research.
details: Anti-obesity drug peptide derived from the C-terminus of human growth hormone (amino acids 176-191), with a Tyr0 addition. Studied for selective fat cell stimulation, lipolysis induction, and metabolic rate enhancement without impacting IGF-1 or insulin levels.
benefits: No Impact on Blood Glucose or IGF-1

name: RE:LIEVE
subtitle: KPV
description: KPV — Anti-inflammatory tripeptide for gut health, wound healing, and systemic inflammation research.
details: Lysine-Proline-Valine (KPV) is a C-terminal tripeptide of alpha-MSH with potent anti-inflammatory properties. Studied for its role in gastrointestinal inflammation, wound healing, and cytokine modulation without the immunosuppressive risks of steroids.

name: RE:SURGE
subtitle: GHRP-6
description: GHRP-6 — Hexapeptide GH secretagogue for GH pulse amplification and appetite research.
details: Synthetic hexapeptide that stimulates GH release by acting on ghrelin receptors. Studied for strong GH pulse amplification, appetite stimulation, and anabolic signalling in research models. Synergistic with GHRH analogues.

name: RE:PAIR
subtitle: TB-500
description: TB-500 — Thymosin Beta-4 for muscle, tendon, and ligament repair and recovery research.
details: Synthetic version of a naturally occurring 43-amino acid peptide that plays a crucial role in actin regulation, cell migration, and tissue regeneration. Studied extensively for wound healing, inflammation reduction, and systemic tissue repair.

name: RE:COVER
subtitle: BPC-157
description: BPC-157 — Body Protection Compound for joint recovery, gut protection, and tissue regeneration research.
details: 15-amino acid peptide derived from human gastric juice. Extensively studied for its role in tissue protection, gut lining repair, tendon healing, and systemic recovery. One of the most researched regenerative peptides available.

name: RE:CHARGE
subtitle: NAD+
description: NAD+ 500mg — Cellular energy and longevity coenzyme for DNA repair, sirtuin activation, and mitochondrial research.
details: Nicotinamide Adenine Dinucleotide is a critical coenzyme found in all living cells. Studied for its role in cellular energy production, DNA repair, sirtuin activation, and mitochondrial function — a cornerstone of longevity research.
benefits: Cellular Energy Production and ATP Synthesis

name: RE:VOLT
subtitle: KLow
description: KLow — Mitochondrial support peptide for cellular energy, metabolic resilience, and longevity research.
details: KLow is a high-concentration mitochondrial performance peptide studied for its role in cellular energy regulation and metabolic homeostasis. At 80mg, this formulation supports deep-level mitochondrial research and bioenergetic pathway modulation.

name: RE:IGNITE
subtitle: Human Growth Hormone
description: HGH 200IU — Recombinant human growth hormone for body composition, recovery, and anti-aging research.
details: Recombinant Human Growth Hormone (somatropin) provided at 200 International Units. Studied for its role in anabolism, fat metabolism, tissue repair, bone density, and cellular regeneration. A cornerstone research compound for body composition and longevity studies.

name: RE:SHIELD
subtitle: Glutathione
description: Glutathione 600mg — Master antioxidant tripeptide for oxidative stress, detoxification, and immune research.
details: Glutathione (GSH) is a naturally occurring tripeptide (Glu-Cys-Gly) and the body's primary endogenous antioxidant. Studied for its role in neutralising free radicals, supporting liver detoxification, immune modulation, and mitochondrial protection at the cellular level.
benefits: Master Antioxidant and Free Radical Neutralisation

name: RE:DESIRE
subtitle: PT-141 (Bremelanotide)
description: PT-141 — Melanocortin receptor agonist for sexual function, libido, and arousal research.
details: Bremelanotide (PT-141) is a synthetic melanocortin analogue acting on the central nervous system via MC3R and MC4R receptors. Studied for its non-hormonal mechanism of action on sexual arousal and libido modulation in both male and female research models.
benefits: Male and Female Sexual Function Studies

name: RE:CENTRE
subtitle: Selank
description: Selank — Anxiolytic nootropic peptide for stress modulation, cognitive clarity, and neuroprotection research.
details: Selank is a synthetic heptapeptide analogue of the immunomodulatory peptide tuftsin. Studied for anxiolytic, nootropic, and neuroprotective properties in research models — modulating GABA, serotonin, and BDNF pathways without sedation or dependency.

name: RE:VIVE
subtitle: SS-31 (Elamipretide)
description: SS-31 — Mitochondria-targeted tetrapeptide for cardioprotection, energy, and longevity research.
details: Elamipretide (SS-31) is a cell-permeable, mitochondria-targeted tetrapeptide that concentrates at the inner mitochondrial membrane. Studied for its role in protecting cardiolipin structure, reducing ROS production, restoring ATP synthesis, and extending cellular lifespan.
benefits: ROS Reduction and Oxidative Stress Protection

name: RE:RADIANCE
subtitle: GLOW Peptide Complex
description: GLOW — Skin-focused peptide complex for radiance, collagen synthesis, and cellular skin regeneration research.
details: GLOW is a high-concentration skin peptide complex formulated at 80mg for advanced dermal regeneration research. Studied for its role in collagen and elastin stimulation, melanin regulation, and oxidative stress reduction at the skin cellular level.
